title: Sales Representative (Food Catering)
description:
Job Description

  • Prepare business plan for sales of executive, staff and foreign worker meals to companies in Jurong Island
  • Seek potential customers, understand their catering needs and prepare sales proposal
  • Negotiate and close sales contracts with customers or their representatives
  • Coordinate fulfilment of orders with kitchen, delivery and onsite teams
  • Maintain excellent relations with customers at all levels

Job Requirement

  • Min 3 year experience in key account sales
  • Familiarity with large companies or workforce in Jurong island with catering needs
  • Knowledge of catering operation preferred but not essential
  • Possess own vehicle or possess good mobility in Jurong Island
  • Energetic and a goal achiever

Only shortlisted candidate will be notified.

GMP Recruitment Services (S) Pte Ltd | EA Licence: 09C3051 | EA Personnel: Jaremy Ong | Registration No: R1876766

This is in partnership with the Employment and Employability Institute Pte Ltd (e2i).

e2i is the empowering network for workers and employers seeking employment and employability solutions. e2i serves as a bridge between workers and employers, connecting with workers to offer job security through job-matching, career guidance and skills upgrading services, and partnering employers to address their manpower needs through recruitment, training, and job redesign solutions. e2i is a tripartite initiative of the National Trades Union Congress set up to support nation-wide manpower and skills upgrading initiatives.

By applying for this role, you consent to GMP Recruitment Services (S) Pte Ltds PDPA and e2is PDPA.

postedCompany.description:
GMP RECRUITMENT SERVICES (S) PTE LTD

GMP Recruitment is a division of The GMP Group.

Founded in 1991, The GMP Group is one of Asia’s leading Staffing and Human Resource Consultancies. Since its inception, the group has progressed to become a regional human capital solutions provider across all industries. Today, GMP is headquartered in Singapore with offices in Hong Kong, Malaysia, Shanghai and Thailand. The group’s extensive network and comprehensive services affirm GMP’s role as one of the most dynamic staffing professionals in the region.
